clusters.title: US to resume Iran blockade, ‘guard’ Strait of Hormuz and charge 20 per cent fee
clusters.neutral_headline: US to resume Iran blockade, ‘guard’ Strait of Hormuz and charge 20 per cent fee
bullet_summary: Reported by The Age, ABC News Australia

items.title: US to resume Iran blockade, ‘guard’ Strait of Hormuz and charge 20 per cent fee
items.standfirst: Donald Trump’s plan to charge ships to use the strait would be a marked departure from the US’ previous insistence that passage through the crucial waterway should be free and open for all.
items.content: Donald Trump’s plan to charge ships to use the strait would be a marked departure from the US’ previous insistence that passage through the crucial waterway should be free and open for all.

items.title: Trump vows to take over Strait of Hormuz and says US will impose fees
items.standfirst: Donald Trump says the US is reinstating its blockade of Iran in the Strait of Hormuz and will start charging for ships from elsewhere to transit through it.
items.content: Donald Trump says the US is reinstating its blockade of Iran in the Strait of Hormuz and will start charging for ships from elsewhere to transit through it.
